name: pg77-real-core-backend
description: PG77 Real Core Backend API with mock game, payment, and bank integrations.

scripts.check: node --check src/server.js && node --check src/app.js && node --check prisma/seed.js && node --check src/integration-tests/payment.mock-test.js && node --check src/integration-tests/bank.mock-test.js && node --check src/integration-tests/sms.mock-test.js && node --check src/integration-tests/slip-ocr.mock-test.js && node --check src/integration-tests/game.mock-test.js && node --check src/local-smoke-tests/stagingSmoke.js && npm run check:safety
scripts.check:safety: node --check src/safety-tests/financialSafetyHarness.js && node --check src/safety-tests/wallet.safety-test.js && node --check src/safety-tests/deposit.safety-test.js && node --check src/safety-tests/withdraw.safety-test.js && node --check src/safety-tests/admin-credit.safety-test.js && node --check src/safety-tests/provider-callback.safety-test.js && node --check src/db-safety-tests/dbSafetyPlan.js && node --check src/db-safety-tests/dbSafetyDryRun.js && node --check src/db-safety-tests/dbSafetyGuard.js && node --check src/db-safety-tests/dbBackedSafetySuite.js
scripts.test:integration:all: npm run test:integration:payment && npm run test:integration:bank && npm run test:integration:sms && npm run test:integration:slip-ocr && npm run test:integration:game
scripts.test:safety:all: npm run test:safety:wallet && npm run test:safety:deposit && npm run test:safety:withdraw && npm run test:safety:admin-credit && npm run test:safety:provider-callback
